findings.current_behavior: Unlimited invalid login attempts were accepted.
findings.expected_behavior: Repeated invalid login attempts should trigger temporary lockout.
findings.root_cause: Missing login throttling/lockout control in /auth/login route.

impact.user: Potential account compromise by brute force.
impact.system: Increased auth attack surface and load.
impact.business: Security incident risk and trust impact.

reproduction_steps: Call POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid login and invalid password repeatedly.
Observe repeated 401 without any lockout before fix.
verification: API test 'bloqueia login apos muitas tentativas invalidas' passes.
After five invalid attempts, next attempt returns HTTP 429 and Retry-After header.

findings.current_behavior: Unread/read status filtering was applied after LIMIT 200.
findings.expected_behavior: Status filtering should happen before LIMIT.
findings.root_cause: Filtering logic executed in memory on already-limited result set.
reproduction_steps: Seed 205 notifications where oldest 5 are unread and newest 200 are resolved.
Before fix, endpoint returns zero unread records.
verification: API test 'nao perde notificacoes nao lidas antigas ao filtrar status unread' passes.
GET /admin/notifications validates status and returns expected unread records.

impact.user: Low direct impact but avoidable parser input risk.
impact.system: Known vulnerable package in production chain.

findings.current_behavior: Frontend workspace has no test files.
findings.expected_behavior: Core frontend flows should have automated tests.
findings.root_cause: No test suite implementation for web components.

impact.system: CI cannot detect frontend behavioral breakage.

reproduction_steps: Observe output: No test files found.
verification: Pending remediation: add web tests and enforce non-empty suite in CI.
